rationale: Educ. Code §25.081 governs minimum school operating minutes. It has no operative connection to homestead exemption amounts or property tax appraisal values under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: for each school year each school district must operate for at least 75,600 minutes, including time allocated for instruction, intermissions, and recesses for students.
_note: No conflict. §25.081 addresses school calendar/minutes of operation, not tax exemptions or school funding formulas.
